description: A forkable freeq agent persona: the 'brain' (system prompt, TTS voice, greeting) plus a reference to the ghostly character it wears. Published to the author's repo so identity, lineage, and fork counts are public and verifiable without trusting any single server.

main.description: A persona definition in the author's repo. The record's at:// URI is its stable identity; `forkedFrom` makes lineage intrinsic and tamper-evident.

name.description: What the agent calls itself and is addressed as.

systemPrompt.description: The personality — used verbatim as the agent's system prompt.

greeting.description: Optional line spoken aloud on joining a call.

forkedFrom.description: The persona this was forked from (its at:// URI). Absent on an original. Pinning the parent here is what makes the fork graph trustless.

voice.description: The base TTS voice. The ghostly character colours it further via its own voice-DSP profile.

speedMilli.description: Speed multiplier x1000 (e.g. 1180 = 1.18x). Integer to stay lexicon-portable (no floats).

face.description: The ghostly character (face + voice DSP) the persona wears.

pack.description: Or an at.freeq.character record for a fully custom face + voice.
